description_long: This object is a rolled-up sleeping bag, compactly bundled into a cylindrical shape with three distinct segments visible along its length, likely due to internal baffles or compression. The exterior fabric appears to be a matte, dark olive green, with subtle seams running along the length and around the ends, suggesting reinforced stitching. The ends of the roll are rounded and slightly indented, with a spiral pattern indicating the way the sleeping bag is tightly rolled. There are no visible zippers, hoods, or external pockets, and the surface texture looks soft and slightly wrinkled, typical of synthetic or nylon sleeping bag shells. The object is compact, suggesting it is in its packed state, ready for transport or storage. No brand logos, patch repairs, or compression straps are visible on the exterior.
description: A compact, rolled-up dark olive green sleeping bag with visible seams and a soft, matte fabric surface.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rolled sleeping bag with three distinct segments and visible seams.
description_view_1: End view displaying the rounded, spiral pattern of the rolled sleeping bag, highlighting the compactness.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the length and segment divisions of the sleeping bag.
description_view_3: Opposite end view, again showing the spiral roll and rounded end of the sleeping bag.
